## Description
A clear description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce
1.
2.

## Expected Behavior
What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior
What actually happened. Include error messages or tracebacks.

## Environment
- **OS**: (e.g., Windows 11, Ubuntu 22.04, macOS 14)
- **Python version**: (e.g., 3.12.10)
- **SynthEd version**: (run `python -c "import synthed; print(synthed.__version__)"`)
- **Install method**: (pip install -e ., pip install synthed, etc.)

## Additional Context
- Relevant section of `pipeline_report.json` (if applicable)
- Population size (N) and seed used
- PersonaConfig changes from defaults (if any)
